description.en:
## Overview

Thung Wua Laen Beach is widely regarded as Chumphon's finest stretch of sand, a two-kilometer crescent of white beach backed by casuarina trees and a relaxed strip of bungalow resorts. Located in Pathio district about 25 kilometers north of Chumphon town, this beach has managed to stay under the radar of mass tourism despite offering the kind of clear water and soft sand that would draw enormous crowds in more developed provinces. The atmosphere is decidedly low-key, with Thai families and budget-conscious travelers making up the majority of visitors.

## Activities

The warm, clear waters off Thung Wua Laen serve as the main departure point for snorkeling and diving trips to the islands of Mu Ko Chumphon National Park, including Koh Ngam Yai and Koh Ngam Noi, which offer some of the best coral reef diving in the Gulf of Thailand with excellent underwater visibility. Snorkeling day trips to the islands cost 1,000 to 2,500 THB per person, while diving excursions range from 2,500 to 4,500 THB. From October through January, consistent winds transform the beach into a kiteboarding hotspot, with schools offering equipment rental and beginner lessons right on the sand. Swimming is pleasant year-round, though the calmest seas are from February through September.

## Food and Accommodation

A string of beachfront restaurants and small resorts line the road behind the beach, serving fresh seafood at prices significantly lower than resort areas further south. Simple bungalow accommodation starts from 500 THB per night, while more comfortable beachfront rooms range from 1,000 to 2,500 THB. Several restaurants set up tables directly on the sand in the evenings.

## Practical Information

Thung Wua Laen Beach is accessible 24 hours and has no entrance fee. The best months for diving and snorkeling are February through October when visibility is highest. Kiteboarding season runs October through January. Getting here from Chumphon town takes about 30 minutes by car or motorbike. Songthaew shared taxis from Chumphon cost around 50 THB per person.
description.nl: Chumphon's mooiste strand strekt zich uit in een lange halve maan van goudkleurig zand, omzoomd door casuarina-bomen en bescheiden bungalowresorts. Het heldere, warme water en de koraalriffen van het Mu Ko Chumphon Nationaal Park maken het uitstekend voor snorkelen, terwijl constante december-maart winden een groeiende kiteboard-gemeenschap aantrekken.

best_time_to_visit: February to October for diving and snorkeling; October to January for kiteboarding
tips: Book snorkeling day trips to Mu Ko Chumphon National Park islands from dive shops along the beach road
October through January brings consistent winds ideal for kiteboarding with lessons available on the beach
Stay overnight in a beachfront bungalow from 500 THB to enjoy the sunset and avoid the day-trip rush

metaTitle.en: Thung Wua Laen Beach - Chumphon's Best Beach | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Thung Wua Laen Beach - Chumphon's Beste Strand | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Visit Thung Wua Laen Beach in Chumphon. Golden sand, coral snorkeling, kiteboarding, and a peaceful atmosphere on the Gulf of Thailand.
metaDescription.nl: Bezoek Thung Wua Laen Beach in Chumphon. Goudkleurig zand, koraal snorkelen, kiteboarden en een vredige sfeer aan de Golf van Thailand.
